creator: cpm@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to mikael.urankar from comment #5)

Try to tweak third_party/swiftshader/third_party/llvm-7.0/configs/linux/include/llvm/Config/config.h

--- third_party/swiftshader/third_party/llvm-7.0/configs/linux/include/llvm/Config/config.h.orig	2019-04-15 10:32:41 UTC
+++ third_party/swiftshader/third_party/llvm-7.0/configs/linux/include/llvm/Config/config.h
@@ -122,7 +122,7 @@
 /* #undef HAVE_MALLCTL */
 
 /* Define to 1 if you have the `mallinfo' function. */
-#define HAVE_MALLINFO 1
+/* #define HAVE_MALLINFO 1 */
 
 /* Define to 1 if you have the <malloc.h> header file. */
 #define HAVE_MALLOC_H 1
